questionHtml: The temperature in the laboratory is higher than the temperature of the ice sample. Describe one other energy transfer that occurs between the ice sample and the laboratory.
markschemeHtml:
from the laboratory to the sample

conduction – contact between ice and lab surface.

OR

convection – movement of air currents

 

Must clearly see direction of energy transfer for MP1.

Must see more than just words “conduction” or “convection” for MP2.

[2 marks]

meta.title: The temperature in the laboratory is higher than the temperature of the ice sample. Describe one other energy transfer that occurs between the ice sample and the laboratory.
